description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust wooden handle and a metallic head. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The wooden handle is cylindrical, straight, and appears to be smoothly finished, providing a comfortable grip. The metal head is slightly weathered, with a matte, silvery-gray finish, and the claw is sharply defined for effective nail removal. The overall construction suggests durability and utility for carpentry or general repair tasks. No visible branding or additional attachments are present on the hammer.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a smooth wooden handle and a metallic head featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and the straight wooden handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the width of the metal head and the alignment of the handle beneath it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the curved claw and the flat striking face, with the handle's grain visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the circular end of the metal head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth finish, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head, steel, with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal
